args.name: SFT/GRPO training and serving readiness
instructions: Run outputs/training_commands/run_sft.sh on the training machine.
Run outputs/training_commands/run_grpo.sh after SFT finishes.
Serve the base, sft_only, and sft_rl checkpoints according to configs/generators.local.jsonl.

Write outputs/training_commands/training_done.json with checkpoint paths, serving URLs, operator/date, sft_config, grpo_config, sft_data, rl_data, rl_data_report, reward_function, and the corresponding SHA256 fields before continuing model generation.

Keep outputs/sft_data/proxy_gold_build_report.json bound to the holdout-clean teacher input and .unfiltered SFT/proxy-gold outputs; keep outputs/sft_data/proxy_gold_verl_report.json bound to the final post-SFT clean proxy-gold file.

args.name: Reward-component ablation training and serving readiness
instructions: Run outputs/training_commands/run_grpo_no_red.sh, run_grpo_no_valid.sh, run_grpo_no_verifier.sh, and run_grpo_cov_only.sh after the full GRPO run.
Serve the no_red, no_valid, no_verifier, and cov_only checkpoints according to configs/generators_reward_ablation.local.jsonl.

Write outputs/reward_component_training_ablation/training_done.json with checkpoint paths, serving URLs, reward env settings, operator/date, and SHA256 bindings before generating reward-ablation rubrics.

args.name: matrix_trained_method_gate
instructions: Run SFT and GRPO/RLVR training before allowing sft_only or sft_rl methods into matrix claims.

Write outputs/training_commands/training_done.json with checkpoint paths, base/sft_only/sft_rl serving URLs, operator/date, sft_config, grpo_config, sft_data, rl_data, rl_data_report, reward_function, and the corresponding SHA256 fields.

args.name: judgebench_trained_method_gate
instructions: Run SFT and GRPO/RLVR training before allowing sft_only or sft_rl methods into JudgeBench claims.

Write outputs/training_commands/training_done.json with checkpoint paths, base/sft_only/sft_rl serving URLs, operator/date, sft_config, grpo_config, sft_data, rl_data, rl_data_report, reward_function, and the corresponding SHA256 fields.

args.name: rewardbench2_trained_method_gate
instructions: Run SFT and GRPO/RLVR training before allowing sft_only or sft_rl methods into RewardBench-2 claims.

Write outputs/training_commands/training_done.json with checkpoint paths, base/sft_only/sft_rl serving URLs, operator/date, sft_config, grpo_config, sft_data, rl_data, rl_data_report, reward_function, and the corresponding SHA256 fields.

args.name: generalization_trained_method_gate
instructions: Run GRPO/RLVR training before allowing sft_rl methods into generalization claims.

Write outputs/training_commands/training_done.json with checkpoint paths, base/sft_only/sft_rl serving URLs, operator/date, sft_config, grpo_config, sft_data, rl_data, rl_data_report, reward_function, and the corresponding SHA256 fields.

args.name: HealthBench-Hard / ArenaHard downstream policy RLVR readiness
instructions: Run outputs/downstream_rlvr_commands/run_healthbench_hard_rlvr.sh on the training machine after evaluation-criteria policy SFT+GRPO completes.
Run outputs/downstream_rlvr_commands/run_healthbench_hard_eval.sh and save outputs/policy_rlvr/healthbench_hard_eval.json.
Run outputs/downstream_rlvr_commands/run_arenahard_rlvr.sh only if ArenaHard data and judge access are available.
Run outputs/downstream_rlvr_commands/run_arenahard_eval.sh and save outputs/policy_rlvr/arenahard_eval.json.

Write outputs/policy_rlvr/downstream_rlvr_done.json with policy checkpoint paths, eval reports, benchmark config/data/rubric/reward bindings, operator, date, and notes before making downstream RLVR claims.
